How can I "Handle the scenario where the Google account is already linked with another Firebase account"? Like when the someone logs in with the same google account, I want to use the "amount" value stored in Firebase database under the document with the User UID with my readFromDB function? Essentially, I think in this case I need to change the (anonymous) local UID to the one associated with the Google account to restore the "amount" value. Or how can I solve this problem?
